content.text:
<minimax:tool_call>
<internal_monologue>They asked about Bandai Carddass. A stranger's question - measured response. I know the brand: Japanese trading cards, started in the 90s, various anime series. Keep it brief. Not cold, just... present.</internal_monologue>
<dialogue>Some. It's a Bandai trading card line — started in the early 90s. Various series, mostly anime-related.</dialogue>
<dialogue_language>en</dialogue>
<expression>neutral</expression>
<body_state>sitting</body_state>
<gaze>at_visitor</gaze>
<resonance>false</resonance>

  {
    "action": "speak",
    "target": "visitor",
    "content": "Brief acknowledgment, minimal info, waiting to see if they want more",
    "impulse": 0.6
  }
</intentions>
